Rooms.Description: In the brightest reach of this forest, you spot a silly little man near a weathered sign.
Rooms.Subtext: Having just awoken, you stand in a strange meadow with a sign, a rat trail south, and forest north.

Rooms.Description: Welcome to the jungle: thick trees, humid air, and strange noises all around.
Rooms.Subtext: The jungle begins here. You can sense trouble deeper inside.

Rooms.Description: A calmer jungle clearing hosts a traveling merchant under a broad tree.
Rooms.Subtext: This is a safe-feeling merchant stop for restocking bombs, scrolls, and tonics.

Rooms.Description: A coastal opening spreads out before you with rough sea wind and salt in the air.
Rooms.Subtext: Open terrain with paths in several directions.

Rooms.Description: A towering Hydra looms at the edge of Dawnbarrow's sea.
Rooms.Subtext: The surf crashes against stone while multiple heads watch your every move.

Rooms.Description: A tutorial-like voice echoes through this forest corridor.
Rooms.Subtext: The air is calmer here, but danger still grows as you push east.

Rooms.Description: The jungle thickens and the danger noticeably spikes.
Rooms.Subtext: Blowflies and heavy air make this place feel hostile.

Rooms.Description: A colossal Chimera blocks the path like a living fortress.
Rooms.Subtext: Old bones and claw marks warn that this is a miniboss lane.

Rooms.Description: The beach glistens while odd sea creatures circle nearby.
Rooms.Subtext: A bright shore with constant movement in the tide pools.

Rooms.Description: A scenic path tempts you away from the main heroic route.
Rooms.Subtext: This road represents the easy exit from the central challenge.

Rooms.Description: A peaceful forest pocket hides endless tiny movement in the brush.
Rooms.Subtext: Rats and critters scatter through shafts of sunlight.

Rooms.Description: A broad river slices through the land and pulls you eastward.
Rooms.Subtext: The stream is calming, but the smell of danger lingers.

Rooms.Description: You stand near the center of Dawnbarrow's 5x5 world grid.
Rooms.Subtext: Everything branches from this central room.

Rooms.Description: The river roars louder and stones in the flow seem breakable.
Rooms.Subtext: This is a key progression lane if you have the right tool.

Rooms.Description: At the fork in the road, one route is kind and one is ominous.
Rooms.Subtext: A sign here can redirect your whole run.

Rooms.Description: The forest acoustics turn eerie as something crawls in the branches.
Rooms.Subtext: Twigs snap underfoot and unseen eyes track your movement.

Rooms.Description: Open grasslands offer breathing room and decent grinding routes.
Rooms.Subtext: Lower-level foes wander the plains.

Rooms.Description: Smoke and fog shroud this field where Cerberus waits.
Rooms.Subtext: This room is a major difficulty spike.

Rooms.Description: A cavern den crackles with static and near-total darkness.
Rooms.Subtext: An underground crossroads with heavy monster presence.

Rooms.Description: A giant door and final battleground dominate this room.
Rooms.Subtext: Without key progress, this path stalls quickly.

Rooms.Description: A stunning but suspiciously grind-friendly forest stretch.
Rooms.Subtext: Beautiful scenery masks repeated danger.

Rooms.Description: A remarkable cat appears in the grasslands, marked and special.
Rooms.Subtext: A companion opportunity sits next to obvious danger.

Rooms.Description: Prairie dogs pop from burrows while one aggressive beast stands out.
Rooms.Subtext: This room can reward social quest progression.

Rooms.Description: Miner goblins occupy this den and guard a giant pickaxe.
Rooms.Subtext: A progression tool can be secured here.

Rooms.Description: At cave's end, a massive lonely creature waits in sorrow.
Rooms.Subtext: This room supports a nonviolent resolution path.
